regimeNotes: RISK-ON (upgraded from neutral). Primary catalyst: US-Iran peace deal reached over the weekend, ending the conflict and reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Oil prices tumbled to a 2-3 month low. This is a decisive macro positive that removes the single biggest inflation risk in the prior regime assessment. KEY DATA (Jun 15 pre-market): Nasdaq futures +2.1%, S&P 500 futures +1.3%. GLD +3.1% to 398.40 USD. EURUSD 1.1597 (USD weakening as geopolitical premium unwinds). 10Y yield ~4.45% (from 4.49% prior, likely to fall further as energy-CPI driver reverses). VIX likely contracting from 19.25. Crypto: BTC +1.8% to 65,662 USD, ETH +2.7%, SOL +4.5%. F&G still 20 (Extreme Fear) -- lagging indicator, classic Buffett buy signal. BTC dominance 56.60%, total mcap 2.32T (+1.75% 24h). INFLATION OUTLOOK CHANGE: May CPI was 4.2% y/y driven by +23.5% energy. With oil now collapsing, the next CPI print should be dramatically cooler. Core CPI at 2.9% remains, but the headline scare is over. FED IMPLICATIONS: Kevin Warsh FOMC on June 17 is still pending, but with oil collapse, the inflation-hawk narrative loses its most potent argument. A hold at 4.25-4.50% is near-certain, but tone may be less hawkish than feared. TRADE EXECUTED: BUY 0.053303 BTC at 65,662 USD (3,500 USD) -- adds to core crypto toward 15 pct position cap. Crypto sleeve now at 20.7 pct NAV, well within 35 pct risk-on cap. POST-FOMC PLAN: If Warsh signals patience and rate-path flexibility, deploy additional cash into equities (NVDA candidate) and potentially add to ETH. Keep 19.3 pct cash buffer for opportunistic deployment.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta; regime now risk-on. Iran deal removes geopolitical drag; SPY at 750.80 pre-market (+1.2%) above prior cost basis of 741.75. S&P benefiting from oil-collapse consumer tailwind and improved Fed flexibility.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed Fed re-pricing toward additional hikes.

MSFT.thesis: AI/cloud quality compounder at 397.54 pre-market (+1.7%). Strong FCF; Nasdaq-led rally on risk-on regime suits MSFT well. Hold and let compound.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality cash machine with AI/search optionality at 365.09 pre-market (+1.5%). Regime favors growth names; GOOGL at a reasonable multiple vs. peers.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Contrarian defensive value at 402.80 pre-market (-1.4% as defensives are sold into risk-on rotation). Long-term thesis intact: analyst upgrades (BofA Buy 450, MS 453, JPM 466), durable earnings, dividend growth.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

TLT.thesis: Long-duration Treasuries; thesis strengthening as oil collapse removes the primary inflation pressure that was threatening the easing path. TLT at 86.06 pre-market (+0.34%). If Warsh holds and signals patience, yields fall and TLT rallies.
TLT.invalidationLevel: 10Y yield decisively above 5 pct (Fed forced to hike again).

GLD.thesis: Debasement and tail-risk hedge at 398.40 pre-market (+3.1%). Soft USD (EURUSD 1.160) and geopolitical-relief rally both support gold at these levels. Outstanding performer since entry.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with strong USD reversal; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader; added 0.053303 BTC today at 65,662 USD on regime upgrade to risk-on. Total position 0.224359 BTC at avgCost 64,629. F&G Extreme Fear (20) = classic accumulation zone. BTC dominance 56.6%; institutional narrative strong.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at 1,720.58 (+2.7%). ETH dominance 8.93% still historically low; asymmetric upside if risk-on capital rotates to alts. Hold; consider adding post-FOMC if regime is confirmed.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: Small high-beta satellite at 71.37 (+4.5%). Outperforming in risk-on session. Sized deliberately small (2.1 pct NAV) for narrative upside optionality.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
